themeDescription: No século XII, em plena Reconquista na Península Ibérica, a fundação de Portugal em 1143 marcou a ascensão do Condado Portucalense a reino independente sob Afonso Henriques. Após anos de batalhas contra os mouros do Al-Andalus e disputas pela suserania leonesa, o Tratado de Zamora selou o nascimento de uma nova entidade cristã, num cenário de constantes conflitos fronteiriços e culturais.

data.theme_description: No século XII, em plena Reconquista na Península Ibérica, a fundação de Portugal em 1143 marcou a ascensão do Condado Portucalense a reino independente sob Afonso Henriques. Após anos de batalhas contra os mouros do Al-Andalus e disputas pela suserania leonesa, o Tratado de Zamora selou o nascimento de uma nova entidade cristã, num cenário de constantes conflitos fronteiriços e culturais.

structure.visualStyle: Realismo histórico com traços heroicos, paleta de cores terrosas e metal envelhecido, focando na autenticidade da arquitetura e vestuário da época.

groups.title: A Espada do Conquistador
groups.description: Centra-se na figura de Afonso Henriques e na nobreza guerreira que forjou o reino. Explora o poder, a liderança e a ambição por trás da independência de Portugal.
groups.mood: Grandioso e imponente, com foco em armaduras detalhadas, estandartes e figuras heroicas. Tons de azul real e dourado, transmitindo autoridade e bravura.

imagePrompts.prompt: Afonso Henriques, clad in magnificent royal blue and gold detailed armor, stands triumphantly on a battlefield amidst his loyal knights, holding a gleaming sword aloft. Behind him, a grand standard emblazoned with a new crest flutters against a dramatic, heroic sky, conveying authority and bravery.

A close-up, heroic shot of a richly decorated medieval knight's gauntlet, resting on the ornate pommel of a gleaming sword, with subtle reflections of a solemn procession and a majestic castle in the background. The scene is bathed in warm golden light, emphasizing power and grandeur.

subgroups.title: O Leão de Guimarães
subgroups.description: Foca-se nos primeiros anos de Afonso Henriques, as suas ambições e as primeiras vitórias que o consolidaram como líder.
subgroups.mood: Ascensão e determinação, com foco em duelos e cenas de treino militar, em tons de terra e cinzento do início da guerra.

imagePrompts.prompt: A young Afonso Henriques, clad in sturdy but not yet ornate early medieval armor, intensely engaged in a fierce sword duel in a muddy training yard, rain falling lightly. His face shows raw determination, surrounded by other young, eager knights honing their skills.

A panoramic view of the rugged, rocky hills around Guimarães, with a small, fortified early medieval castle silhouetted against a dramatic dawn sky. A disciplined column of early Portuguese soldiers marches across a winding path in the foreground, banners furled.

subgroups.title: Os Cavaleiros do Reino Nascente
subgroups.description: Explora a composição da nobreza guerreira portuguesa, as suas lealdades, juramentos e o espírito de corpo que unia os cavaleiros.
subgroups.mood: Camaradagem e rigor militar, com foco em formações de batalha e símbolos de honra. Cores vibrantes dos brasões e armaduras polidas.

imagePrompts.prompt: A disciplined phalanx of early Portuguese knights, their detailed chainmail glinting under sunlight, standing shoulder-to-shoulder, holding their shields forward in a unified formation. Their faces are resolute, conveying a mix of determination and shared purpose.

A close-up of several ornate, heraldic banners, emblazoned with early Portuguese symbols, flying proudly in the wind against a clear sky. In the foreground, the polished helmets and breastplates of assembled knights reflect the sunlight, signifying their honor.

subgroups.title: A Batalha de Ourique
subgroups.description: Detalha o momento mítico e decisivo que solidificou a independência e o carisma de Afonso Henriques como rei.
subgroups.mood: Tensão e glória divina, com um campo de batalha caótico mas heroico, luz mística e cores intensas de combate.

imagePrompts.prompt: Afonso Henriques on horseback, bathed in an ethereal, golden light emanating from above, leading a furious charge against a vastly superior Moorish army in the midst of chaotic battle. Swords clash, dust rises, and a sense of divine intervention permeates the scene.

A wide shot of a medieval battlefield, filled with the intense clash of swords, flying arrows, and falling soldiers. In the foreground, a Portuguese knight raises his sword in a moment of dramatic victory over a fallen enemy, amidst the vibrant and intense colors of the conflict.

subgroups.title: O Tratado de Zamora
subgroups.description: Foca-se nos aspetos diplomáticos e políticos que formalizaram o reconhecimento de Portugal como reino independente.
subgroups.mood: Formalidade e gravidade, com salas de corte ricamente decoradas, pergaminhos e selos reais. Tons escuros e ricos de madeira e tapeçarias.

imagePrompts.prompt: Afonso Henriques, in regal, dignified attire, standing formally before a stern King Alfonso VII of León in a grand, candlelit medieval hall, surrounded by solemn advisors and meticulous scribes. A large, illuminated parchment with a prominent wax seal lies on a heavy wooden table between them.

A close-up of a medieval scribe's hand, meticulously inking a quill on a parchment scroll, with various wax seals and an ornate royal emblem visible in the background, signifying a crucial diplomatic agreement in a formal setting.

subgroups.title: As Muralhas Reconquistadas
subgroups.description: Aborda a expansão territorial do novo reino através da reconquista de fortalezas e cidades estratégicas.
subgroups.mood: Conquista e vigilância, com foco em cercos a castelos, paisagens acidentadas e a constante ameaça da fronteira. Cores robustas e terrosas, com toques de fumo e fogo.

imagePrompts.prompt: Portuguese soldiers bravely scaling the formidable walls of a besieged Moorish castle using ladders, under a relentless hail of arrows and stones. Smoke rises dramatically from siege engines below, and the battle rages fiercely around the fortress.

A solitary Portuguese sentry, clad in battle-worn armor, silhouetted against a dramatic sunset, standing vigilant on the ramparts of a newly conquered castle overlooking a vast, rugged, and contested frontier landscape, hinting at ongoing threats.

subgroups.title: O Legado do Conquistador
subgroups.description: Contempla o impacto duradouro de Afonso Henriques e a fundação de Portugal na identidade e história da nação.
subgroups.mood: Histórico e reverente, com esculturas, ilustrações de crónicas e elementos simbólicos da identidade portuguesa. Tons suaves e intemporais, com brilhos de ouro envelhecido.

imagePrompts.prompt: A majestic medieval statue of Afonso Henriques, sculpted from ancient, weathered stone, standing proudly in a sun-drenched courtyard, surrounded by the architectural grandeur of a historical Portuguese monastery, evoking a sense of timeless legacy.

An aged, richly illustrated manuscript page depicting Afonso Henriques, with intricate gold leaf borders and faded, deep colors. The artwork symbolizes the enduring historical record and the lasting legacy of the nation's revered founder.

groups.title: O Campo de Batalha
groups.description: Representa os conflitos militares incessantes contra mouros e leoneses que definiram a época. Aborda táticas de guerra, fortificações e o custo humano do combate pela terra.
groups.mood: Áspero e brutal, com foco em cenas de combate dinâmicas, armas enferrujadas e paisagens devastadas pela guerra. Tons de cinza, marrom e vermelho sangue, evocando o sacrifício.

imagePrompts.prompt: A chaotic, close-quarters medieval battle scene. Knights in tarnished armor clash with swords and shields amidst mud and blood. Overcast sky casts a grim, desaturated light. Broken weapons and fallen soldiers litter the foreground, evoking harsh sacrifice.

A desolate, smoke-filled battlefield at dusk. Silhouettes of a few weary, surviving soldiers stand amidst the wreckage of a recent siege. Distant fires glow with an eerie red light. Rusted helmets, shattered wooden shields, and spent arrows are scattered across the ground.

subgroups.title: As Lanças de Portugal
subgroups.description: Detalha as formações militares, estratégias e engenharia de cerco empregadas tanto por cristãos quanto por mouros.
subgroups.mood: Organizado mas tenso, com foco na disciplina e na estratégia da batalha. Diagramas de formação e planos de cerco, tons de terra e metal.

imagePrompts.prompt: A medieval war council tent at night, illuminated by flickering torches. Commanders in practical armor huddle over a crude map spread on a table, discussing battle plans with intense expressions. Shadows dance on their determined faces. Weapons lean against the tent walls.

A disciplined line of Portuguese spearmen, shields interlocked, facing an unseen enemy on a dusty plain. Sunlight glints off their spear points and metal helmets. A tangible sense of impending clash, with dust rising from the ground.

subgroups.title: Os Baluartes Inquebráveis
subgroups.description: Explora a construção e a defesa de castelos e muralhas, elementos cruciais para a proteção territorial.
subgroups.mood: Robustez e resiliência, com imagens de pedras maciças, torres imponentes e máquinas de cerco. Cinzas e marrons dominam.

imagePrompts.prompt: A massive medieval castle under siege, with trebuchets hurling large stones at its formidable walls. Defenders on ramparts firing arrows and dropping rocks. Smoke and debris fill the air. A gritty, realistic depiction of medieval siege warfare under a somber sky.

A close-up of a damaged, weathered stone castle wall, showing cracks and scorch marks from recent attacks. Moss grows between the ancient stones. A lone, weary sentinel in simple armor looks out from a crenelated battlement, overlooking a desolate, war-torn landscape.

subgroups.title: O Ferro Forjado
subgroups.description: Apresenta o arsenal usado pelos combatentes, desde espadas e machados até arcos e balistas, e as armaduras de proteção.
subgroups.mood: Funcional e desgastado pelo uso, exibindo o artesanato rude das armas medievais. Detalhes em metal, couro e madeira.

imagePrompts.prompt: A collection of medieval weapons: a rusted longsword, a heavy battle-axe, and a wooden crossbow laid out on a rough, scarred wooden table. Scratched leather gauntlets and a dented iron helmet rest beside them, illuminated by a dim, natural light source.

A close-up of a worn, dented round shield bearing a faded heraldic emblem of Portugal. Arrows are embedded in its wooden surface. A pair of mud-splattered gauntlets rests on the ground next to it, suggesting a moment of respite or a fallen warrior.

subgroups.title: Cicatrizes da Reconquista
subgroups.description: Foca nas consequências da guerra para os soldados e civis, abordando ferimentos, perdas e a resiliência humana.
subgroups.mood: Sombrio e introspectivo, com cenas de pós-batalha, feridos e luto. Cores esmaecidas, com toques de vermelho escuro.

imagePrompts.prompt: A dimly lit field hospital tent after a brutal battle. Wounded soldiers lie on straw, grim-faced medics and healers tend to injuries with crude tools. The air is heavy with exhaustion and suffering. Dim light from a single, flickering lantern.

A solitary figure, a woman in simple medieval attire, weeping silently over a simple grave marked with a broken sword or shield. A desolate, windswept landscape stretches behind her under an overcast, gray sky, conveying profound loss.

subgroups.title: A Carga Imparável
subgroups.description: Enfatiza o papel crucial da cavalaria pesada e dos cavaleiros como a ponta de lança das forças cristãs e a elite guerreira.
subgroups.mood: Poderoso e dinâmico, com foco em cavalos em plena carga, armaduras reluzentes e bandeiras ao vento.

imagePrompts.prompt: A dramatic charge of Portuguese knights on horseback, lances lowered, thundering across a battlefield towards an unseen enemy line. Dust clouds are kicked up by galloping hooves. Sunlight glints off their polished armor and the vibrant banners fluttering in the wind, capturing dynamic power.

A close-up of a powerful warhorse's head, partially armored with barding, its eyes fierce and focused. A knight's armored hand, gripping the reins tightly, is visible. The horse's breath is visible in the cold air, conveying immense power and readiness for combat.

subgroups.title: Terra de Ninguém
subgroups.description: Descreve as escaramuças constantes e a natureza volátil das fronteiras entre os reinos cristãos e as taifas mouras.
subgroups.mood: Tenso e vigilante, com foco em patrulhas, emboscadas e paisagens acidentadas que servem de fronteira.

imagePrompts.prompt: A small group of Christian scouts on horseback cautiously traverses a rugged, rocky mountain pass at dawn. Fog clings to the valleys below, partially obscuring the treacherous terrain. A sense of danger and unknown territory permeates the scene, with weapons at the ready.

Two opposing medieval patrols, one Christian and one Moorish, spot each other across a narrow, winding river that forms a natural border. Both groups immediately halt, standing alert with hands on their weapons, in a tense standoff within a wild, untamed landscape.

groups.title: Os Reinos do Sul
groups.description: Explora a cultura e o poder do Al-Andalus, os adversários islâmicos de Portugal e uma fonte de fascínio e conflito. Destaca a sua arquitetura, conhecimento e a riqueza que atraía a cobiça.
groups.mood: Exótico e vibrante, com arquitetura mourisca detalhada, jardins exuberantes e tapetes ricos. Tons quentes de ocre, turquesa e bronze, sugerindo opulência e mistério.

imagePrompts.prompt: A panoramic view of a bustling Al-Andalus city market at dusk. Intricate Moorish architecture with horseshoe arches and geometric patterns in warm ocre and terracotta tones, lit by hanging lanterns. Merchants display colorful spices, woven carpets in deep reds and blues, and gleaming bronze wares. Lush palm trees and exotic plants in tiled courtyards. The air shimmers with a sense of vibrant life and mystery.

An interior shot of a grand Al-Andalus palace courtyard. A serene central fountain with intricate mosaic tiles in turquoise and gold. The walls are adorned with elaborate stucco work (muqarnas) and calligraphy. Sunlight streams through an arched window, casting long shadows. Rich, heavy tapestries in jewel tones hang from balconies. A few elegantly dressed figures in flowing silks relax amidst potted citrus trees, conveying opulence and tranquility.

subgroups.title: Os Arquitetos da Luz
subgroups.description: Explora a grandiosidade e a inovação da arquitetura mourisca, desde mesquitas majestosas a palácios intricados.
subgroups.mood: Majestoso e detalhado, com foco em arcos de ferradura, azulejos intrincados, pátios serenos e a interação da luz e sombra.

imagePrompts.prompt: A close-up of an intricate horseshoe archway in an ancient Moorish palace. The arch is adorned with detailed stucco carvings and geometric patterns in shades of cream and ochre. Soft light filters through, highlighting the textures. A glimpse of a serene, tiled courtyard with a small fountain is visible beyond the arch.

An aerial view of a grand mosque courtyard in Al-Andalus. The ground is covered in vibrant mosaic tiles. A central ablution fountain surrounded by rows of slender, elegant columns. Sunlight creates sharp shadows, emphasizing the architectural precision and the play of light.

subgroups.title: Os Jardins da Sabedoria
subgroups.description: Foca nos vastos conhecimentos científicos, filosóficos e artísticos que floresceram nos centros urbanos do Al-Andalus.
subgroups.mood: Sereno e intelectual, com pergaminhos antigos, instrumentos astronómicos em latão, jardins botânicos e bibliotecas iluminadas por lanternas.

imagePrompts.prompt: An old scholar in flowing robes examining an astrolabe by the light of a brass oil lamp in a richly decorated study. Books with intricate bindings line wooden shelves. Scrolls and maps are spread across a carved wooden table. A window looks out onto a moonlit garden.

A lush botanical garden within a palace, featuring exotic plants, medicinal herbs, and small, flowing water channels. A philosopher sits on a tiled bench, engrossed in a scroll. The atmosphere is peaceful, with diffused light filtering through dense foliage.

subgroups.title: As Rotas do Incenso e do Ouro
subgroups.description: Destaca a riqueza económica e as extensas redes comerciais que conectavam o Al-Andalus com África, Médio Oriente e Ásia.
subgroups.mood: Rico e dinâmico, com caravanas de camelos, mercados movimentados cheios de especiarias e sedas, e tesouros cintilantes.

imagePrompts.prompt: A bustling market stall laden with exotic spices in earthenware pots, shimmering silk fabrics, and intricately crafted gold jewelry. Merchants haggle with customers. The background shows vibrant textiles hanging from awnings and the intricate patterns of a busy souk.

A caravan of camels silhouetted against a desert sunset, carrying bundles of goods and treasures across vast, undulating sand dunes. The sky is painted in hues of orange, purple, and deep blue, evoking a sense of ancient trade routes and epic journeys.

subgroups.title: Os Guerreiros do Crescente
subgroups.description: Apresenta as forças militares do Al-Andalus, suas táticas, armamento e as fortificações que defendiam.
subgroups.mood: Marcial e resiliente, com armaduras detalhadas, cimitarras curvas, estandartes com o crescente e torres de vigia imponentes.

imagePrompts.prompt: A group of Al-Andalus warriors in intricate chainmail and ornate helmets, wielding curved scimitars and round shields with geometric designs. They stand guard on a sun-drenched rampart of a formidable stone fortress, overlooking a vast landscape.

A close-up of a meticulously crafted scimitar, its blade gleaming, resting beside a detailed shield adorned with Islamic calligraphy. The background is a blurred image of a tent camp or a castle interior, emphasizing the warrior culture.

subgroups.title: As Cortes dos Emirados
subgroups.description: Explora a vida na corte dos emires e califas, com suas intrigas, cerimónias e o luxo que os cercava.
subgroups.mood: Opulento e dramático, com tapeçarias ricas, música melódica, dançarinos e banquetes suntuosos em salões decorados.

imagePrompts.prompt: An opulent court scene inside a grand Al-Andalus palace. An emir is seated on a plush cushion, surrounded by courtiers in rich silks. Musicians play exotic instruments, and dancers perform gracefully. The hall is adorned with intricate tile work and hanging lanterns, creating a warm, inviting glow.

A close-up of a lavishly decorated table laden with exotic fruits, intricate pastries, and fine ceramics. Goblets are filled with sparkling liquids. The background suggests a grand feast, with soft light from ornate windows and the murmur of conversation.

subgroups.title: A Convivência e o Conflito
subgroups.description: Aborda a complexa relação entre as culturas islâmica, cristã e judaica no Al-Andalus, marcada por períodos de tolerância e hostilidade.
subgroups.mood: Matizado e contrastante, com símbolos de diferentes fés, interações em mercados e momentos de tensão fronteiriça.

imagePrompts.prompt: A busy street scene in a multicultural Al-Andalus city. Merchants and citizens of different faiths (Muslims, Christians, Jews) interact peacefully in a market square. Architectural styles blend, with elements of a mosque, a church, and a synagogue visible in the background. The atmosphere is one of bustling coexistence.

A tense borderland scene at a fortified outpost, where Muslim warriors on horseback gaze across a valley towards a distant Christian castle. The landscape is rugged and untamed, with a dramatic sky overhead, symbolizing the constant frontier conflicts.

groups.title: A Voz da Fé
groups.description: Abrange a influência da Igreja Católica na Reconquista e na legitimação do novo reino. Inclui mosteiros, clérigos e o papel da fé como motor moral e político da sociedade medieval.
groups.mood: Solene e espiritual, com vitrais iluminados, manuscritos antigos e a austeridade da arquitetura românica. Tons de roxo cardinal, branco puro e dourado celestial, expressando devoção.

imagePrompts.prompt: A solemn Romanesque church interior, sunlight streaming through a large, intricate stained-glass window depicting a saint, casting patterns of cardinal purple, pure white, and celestial gold onto the stone floor. A sense of profound spiritual devotion pervades the scene.

An ancient, illuminated manuscript open on a heavy wooden lectern within a quiet monastery library. The pages display intricate golden leafwork and rich purple ink, reflecting the austere yet spiritual mood of medieval scholarship.

subgroups.title: Os Mosteiros Fortificados
subgroups.description: Explora o duplo papel dos mosteiros como centros de fé e conhecimento, e como baluartes estratégicos na fronteira da Reconquista.
subgroups.mood: Robusto e austero, com paredes de pedra maciça, arcadas sombrias e uma atmosfera de devoção resiliente.

imagePrompts.prompt: A sprawling medieval fortified monastery, with high stone walls, battlements, and a central Romanesque church, silhouetted against a dawn sky. A narrow river flows nearby, emphasizing its strategic location.
Inside a monastery cloister, a lone monk in a simple habit walks, his head bowed in prayer, surrounded by austere stone arches and a small, peaceful garden. The light is soft and diffused.

subgroups.title: Os Bispos Guerreiros
subgroups.description: Foca-se nos clérigos que, além das suas funções espirituais, exerciam poder político e, por vezes, comandavam forças militares na defesa do território.
subgroups.mood: Autoritário e imponente, com vestes episcopais e armaduras discretas, tons de vermelho profundo e cinza-aço, expressando uma liderança resoluta.

imagePrompts.prompt: A powerful bishop, clad in ornate vestments and subtle chainmail beneath, stands on a battlements overlooking a medieval siege, offering a blessing to armored knights below. His expression is stern and resolute.

Inside a grand, candlelit council chamber, a group of stern-faced bishops in rich robes deliberate with secular lords, maps spread on a heavy oak table. The mood is tense and serious, highlighting their political influence.

subgroups.title: Os Escribas Sagrados
subgroups.description: Destaca o trabalho dos monges escribas na preservação da cultura, da história e dos textos religiosos, essenciais para a identidade e legitimação do novo reino.
subgroups.mood: Meticuloso e sereno, com a luz suave de velas sobre pergaminhos e tintas vibrantes, um ambiente de concentração e devoção intelectual.

imagePrompts.prompt: A monk with a quill carefully illuminating the initial letter of a sacred text in a scriptorium. Sunlight streams through a small window, highlighting the intricate details of gold leaf and vibrant pigments on the parchment.
A close-up of an ancient, open codex, displaying beautiful calligraphy and miniature illustrations of biblical scenes. The texture of the aged parchment and the rich colors of the ink are prominent.

subgroups.title: As Relíquias e Romarias
subgroups.description: Explora a importância das relíquias sagradas e das rotas de peregrinação como elementos unificadores da fé e atrativos económicos e culturais.
subgroups.mood: Reverente e esperançoso, com a luz quente de velas votivas, santuários adornados e a imagem de peregrinos em busca de milagres.

imagePrompts.prompt: A small group of medieval pilgrims, weary but determined, walk along a dusty path towards a distant, humble chapel visible on a hill. Their faces show hope and devotion.

Inside a dimly lit shrine, a single, ornate reliquary, possibly made of gold and jewels, rests on an altar, surrounded by numerous flickering votive candles. The atmosphere is quiet and deeply reverent.

subgroups.title: A Doutrina e a Obediência
subgroups.description: Aborda a função da Igreja na formulação e imposição da doutrina cristã, moldando a moral e a obediência dos fiéis no novo reino.
subgroups.mood: Disciplinado e didático, com representações de sermões e lições morais através de afrescos e esculturas, inspirando conformidade e fé.

imagePrompts.prompt: A stern-faced cleric preaches from a simple stone pulpit to a congregation of medieval villagers kneeling attentively in a modest Romanesque church. The sunlight casts long shadows, emphasizing seriousness.

A detailed fresco on a church wall depicting a scene of divine judgment or a moral allegory, with figures clearly illustrating virtues and vices. The colors are muted but impactful, designed to educate and inspire awe.

subgroups.title: O Simbolismo dos Templários
subgroups.description: Investiga a presença e a influência das ordens militares religiosas, como os Templários, na defesa da fé e na expansão do território cristão.
subgroups.mood: Místico e marcial, com o contraste entre a austera disciplina monástica e a armadura de batalha, simbolizando uma fé guerreira.

imagePrompts.prompt: A lone Templar knight in full armor, recognizable by his white surcoat with a red cross, kneels in prayer before a simple wooden cross in a stark, ancient stone chapel. A sword rests beside him.

The imposing silhouette of a Templar castle, with its distinctive towers and fortifications, stands against a dramatic, cloudy sky at dusk. Banners with the red cross flutter in the wind, symbolizing strength and faith.

groups.title: As Terras e o Povo
groups.description: Foca-se na vida quotidiana dos camponeses, artesãos e na gestão dos recursos naturais que sustentavam o condado. Mostra a base económica e social do reino em formação e a luta pela subsistência.
groups.mood: Rústico e orgânico, com campos cultivados, vilas humildes e ferramentas de trabalho. Tons de verde terra, marrom e ocre natural, transmitindo simplicidade e resiliência.

imagePrompts.prompt: A wide shot of a medieval Portuguese village nestled in a valley, with simple stone and wattle-and-daub houses. Fields of wheat and barley stretch out, some being tilled by oxen and wooden plows. The sky is clear, with a warm, natural light. Colors are earthy greens, browns, and ochre, emphasizing a rustic and resilient atmosphere.

A close-up of a peasant woman's hands, worn by labor, sifting grain on a wooden tray. Her roughspun tunic sleeve is visible. In the background, out of focus, a small, humble stone house and a dirt path. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting textures of rough fabric, wood, and grain. Earthy color palette.

subgroups.title: Os Campos de Subsistência
subgroups.description: Detalha as práticas agrícolas e os desafios enfrentados pelos camponeses para cultivar a terra e garantir a alimentação.
subgroups.mood: Trabalho árduo, ciclos sazonais, dependência da natureza. Cores terrosas, luz natural intensa.

imagePrompts.prompt: A group of medieval Portuguese peasants, men and women, diligently harvesting wheat with sickles under a bright, late summer sun. Their simple, patched clothing is visible, and the golden fields stretch to a distant, forested horizon. A feeling of manual labor and connection to the land.

An elderly peasant man with a weathered face carefully inspecting young olive saplings in a small grove. His hands are calloused, and his gaze is focused. The light filters through the sparse leaves, casting gentle shadows. Rustic and organic feel.

subgroups.title: As Vilas e Ofícios
subgroups.description: Explora a vida nas pequenas vilas, os artesãos e os seus ofícios essenciais para a comunidade, como ferreiros, tecelões e carpinteiros.
subgroups.mood: Agitação modesta, cheiros de madeira e fumo, ferramentas manuais. Texturas de pedra, madeira e metal.

imagePrompts.prompt: A bustling medieval Portuguese village square, with a few small, simple stalls selling handcrafted goods. A blacksmith works at his forge in the background, sparks flying. Villagers in period attire go about their daily lives. Earthy tones, rustic architecture.

A close-up of a potter's hands shaping clay on a simple wooden wheel, with various finished pottery pieces drying nearby. The workshop is humble, with natural light filtering in. Focus on the craftsmanship and tactile nature of the work.

subgroups.title: Recursos Naturais e Florestas
subgroups.description: Aborda a importância das florestas, rios e outros recursos naturais para a construção, caça e recolha, e como eram geridos.
subgroups.mood: Natureza selvagem mas útil, elementos crus e intocados. Tons profundos de verde, marrom e azul.

imagePrompts.prompt: A medieval Portuguese woodcutter, axe in hand, felling a large oak tree in a dense forest. Sunlight filters through the canopy, highlighting the raw textures of wood chips and rough bark. A sense of hard labor amidst nature.

A clear, pristine river flowing through a lush, medieval Portuguese forest. A small, simple wooden fishing weir is visible, hinting at resource utilization. The water reflects the deep greens of the trees and a clear blue sky.

subgroups.title: A Vida no Lar e a Família
subgroups.description: Detalha a estrutura familiar, os papéis de género e as atividades domésticas que mantinham as casas camponesas.
subgroups.mood: Intimidade, calor do lar, simplicidade. Luz ambiente, objetos quotidianos.

imagePrompts.prompt: A medieval Portuguese peasant family gathered around a simple hearth inside their wattle-and-daub home. A mother is stirring a pot, children play on the straw-covered floor, and the father mends a tool. Warm, firelit interior, humble furnishings.

A young medieval Portuguese girl helping her mother spin wool with a drop spindle by a small window. The room is sparsely furnished, highlighting their simple life. Soft, natural light illuminates their faces and the textured wool.

subgroups.title: Comércio Local e Trocas
subgroups.description: Foca-se nas pequenas trocas e no comércio local que conectava as vilas e aldeias, permitindo a circulação de bens essenciais.
subgroups.mood: Interação social, frugalidade, pequenas transações. Ambientes de mercado ao ar livre, cestas e produtos.

imagePrompts.prompt: A small, bustling medieval Portuguese weekly market scene in a village square. Peasants are exchanging goods like vegetables, eggs, and simple crafts. Merchants display their wares on wooden tables or blankets on the ground. Authentic period clothing and simple architecture.

A close-up of two medieval Portuguese individuals, one a peasant and the other a small merchant, negotiating over a basket of freshly caught fish. Their hands are gesturing, and the expressions show a subtle exchange. Rustic setting with natural light.

subgroups.title: Infraestruturas Rurais
subgroups.description: Mostra as estruturas básicas que apoiavam a vida rural, como moinhos de água, pontes simples e caminhos de terra batida.
subgroups.mood: Engenho rústico, integração com a paisagem. Elementos de pedra, madeira e água.

imagePrompts.prompt: A medieval Portuguese water mill, with its large wooden wheel slowly turning, next to a flowing river. The structure is made of rough-hewn stone and timber, blending into the surrounding green landscape. Sunlight dappling through trees.

A simple, arched stone bridge spanning a narrow stream, connecting two dirt paths in a medieval Portuguese rural area. A lone figure on horseback is crossing it. The bridge shows signs of age, conveying a sense of enduring utility. Earthy tones dominate.

groups.title: Intriga e Coroa
groups.description: Aborda os complexos jogos políticos, alianças e tratados, como o de Zamora, que consolidaram a independência. Revela as negociações secretas e a diplomacia por trás da fundação.
groups.mood: Formal e estratégico, com mapas antigos, selos reais e cenas de corte ou negociação. Tons de verde escuro, azul marinho e prata, simbolizando a complexidade e a astúcia política.

imagePrompts.prompt: A medieval court chamber, dimly lit, with a large, ornate wooden table at the center. Several noblemen in rich, dark robes are gathered around, leaning over an unfurled ancient map of the Iberian Peninsula. Candles cast flickering shadows, highlighting the intense expressions on their faces. Dominant colors are deep greens, royal blues, and touches of silver embroidery on their attire. Royal seals and quills lie scattered on the table. Highly detailed, realistic medieval art style.

Close-up of a hand stamping a heavy wax seal onto a rolled parchment, showcasing a detailed royal crest. The background is blurred, suggesting a grand, formal hall with glimpses of tapestries in deep blue and green hues. A silver inkwell and a feathered quill are visible. The scene is bathed in a soft, strategic light, emphasizing the historical weight of the act. Focus on texture and historical authenticity.

subgroups.title: O Xadrez Leonês
subgroups.description: As complexas relações de suserania e os movimentos estratégicos que Afonso Henriques manobrou para se libertar da dependência do Reino de Leão.
subgroups.mood: Intenso e calculista, com ênfase em selos, pergaminhos e símbolos heráldicos de Leão. Paleta de cores realçada com tons de vermelho e dourado, misturados com os azuis e pratas do grupo principal.

imagePrompts.prompt: A close-up shot of a chessboard made of carved stone, with pieces representing medieval kings and knights. One piece, symbolizing Afonso Henriques, is strategically positioned to capture a piece with a lion rampant, representing León. The setting is a dimly lit, austere room, with an aged scroll partly unrolled in the background. Colors feature deep reds, golden accents, and muted blues. High detail, historical realism.

An ancient, weathered parchment displaying intricate heraldry: the rampant lion of León prominently featured, partially overlaid with a nascent Portuguese shield (quinas). Hands, subtly obscured, are reaching towards the document, suggesting negotiation or alteration. The atmosphere is tense and historically significant. Dominant colors are faded reds, golds, and parchment tones.

subgroups.title: Diplomacia Sombria
subgroups.description: Os bastidores das negociações, as alianças secretas e as missivas trocadas entre nobres e clérigos que pavimentaram o caminho para a independência.
subgroups.mood: Misterioso e discreto, com sombras profundas, velas tremeluzentes e mensagens cifradas. Predominam tons de sépia, cinza chumbo e verde musgo.

imagePrompts.prompt: A shadowy cloaked figure, face obscured, handing a rolled, sealed parchment to another figure in a dimly lit, stone corridor. A single flickering candle provides the only light, casting long, dramatic shadows. The architecture is ancient medieval. Dominant colors are dark greys, deep moss greens, and sepia tones. Focus on secrecy and intrigue.

An ornate, locked wooden chest, slightly ajar, revealing glimmers of hidden documents and a small, intricate key. The chest rests on a heavy, dark wooden table. Moonlight streams through a narrow window, creating a stark contrast of light and shadow. The scene evokes a sense of unearthed secrets. Sepia and charcoal grey dominate the color palette.

subgroups.title: O Tratado de Zamora
subgroups.description: A descrição detalhada do evento e do documento que formalizou o reconhecimento de Portugal como reino pelo Reino de Leão, um marco crucial.
subgroups.mood: Grandioso e definitivo, com pergaminhos imponentes, pena de ganso e tinteiro, sob um brasão real. Azul profundo, ouro velho e ocre, transmitindo a solenidade do momento.

imagePrompts.prompt: A grand, illuminated parchment, aged but pristine, bearing the official text of the Treaty of Zamora, with large, elaborate calligraphic script and a prominent royal seal. A quill and an inkwell are placed beside it. The background suggests a solemn, richly decorated room, possibly a medieval study or chancellery. Colors are deep blues, old gold, and warm ocre. Highly detailed, formal aesthetic.

Two hands, one adorned with a royal ring, formally shaking over an important document laid on a heavy wooden table. The document has intricate seals visible. The setting is a well-lit, stately hall with banners depicting royal crests. The scene conveys a sense of agreement and finality. Dominant colors are deep blues, rich golds, and wood tones, with a touch of silver.

subgroups.title: O Legado dos Condes
subgroups.description: A influência e as decisões dos condes portucalenses anteriores, que lançaram as bases para a autonomia desejada por Afonso Henriques.
subgroups.mood: Histórico e fundacional, com retratos de figuras medievais, ruínas antigas e mapas genealógicos. Tons de castanho, terra e verde-azeitona, com toques de bronze e cobre.

imagePrompts.prompt: An ancient, faded tapestry depicting medieval noble figures, possibly early Counts of Portugal, in stern, regal poses. The tapestry hangs in a decaying but majestic castle hall, with hints of stone architecture. The colors are muted browns, earthy tones, and olive greens, with touches of bronze in the fabric. A sense of history and legacy pervades the image.

A crumbling stone wall, part of an ancient fortress, overgrown with ivy. On a surviving section of the wall, an etched or carved heraldic symbol, possibly an early Portucalense crest, is visible. The scene is bathed in soft, historical light, evoking a sense of enduring lineage and past foundations. Earthy browns, greens, and stone greys dominate.

subgroups.title: A Voz do Clero
subgroups.description: O papel crucial da Igreja e das figuras eclesiásticas nas negociações políticas, mediando conflitos e legitimando a fundação do reino.
subgroups.mood: Sagrado e influente, com vitrais coloridos, paramentos ricamente bordados e manuscritos iluminados. Tons de roxo cardinal, dourado e azul celeste, com a gravidade da fé.

imagePrompts.prompt: Inside a grand medieval cathedral, sunlight streams through a vibrant stained-glass window depicting a religious scene. In the foreground, a robed bishop or abbot, in rich cardinal purple vestments, stands beside a carved stone pulpit, holding an illuminated manuscript. The atmosphere is solemn and sacred. Colors are deep purples, golds, and celestial blues, with light rays catching dust motes.

A close-up of an open, ancient illuminated manuscript, displaying intricate religious artwork and calligraphic script. A hand in a simple, clerical robe points to a specific passage. The background is softly blurred, hinting at an ornate church interior. Dominant colors are rich golds, blues, and purples, emphasizing the spiritual authority and detailed artistry.

subgroups.title: As Alianças Matrimoniais
subgroups.description: Os casamentos arranjados e as intrincadas redes familiares que foram utilizadas para fortalecer a posição de Portugal e garantir apoio internacional.
subgroups.mood: Regal e romântico, mas com subtons estratégicos. Vestidos de corte, joias ancestrais e escudos de armas entrelaçados. Rosa antigo, marfim e prata, com a delicadeza e a força das uniões.

imagePrompts.prompt: A medieval bridal couple, dressed in elaborate court attire, stands formally before a tapestry displaying two entwined heraldic shields. The bride wears a gown of antique rose and ivory, adorned with silver embroidery, while the groom is in rich, dark fabrics. Their expressions are serious, hinting at the strategic nature of the union. A soft, regal light illuminates the scene.

A close-up of two intertwined hands, one with a simple silver wedding band, resting on a velvet cushion. In the background, a subtle, blurred image of a scroll or document with crests can be seen. The overall mood is one of delicate alliance and formal commitment. Colors are soft antique rose, ivory, and silver, with deep velvet textures.

groups.title: Pontos de Virada
groups.description: Este grupo representa os momentos cruciais onde as decisões e os eventos históricos moldam drasticamente o destino das facções e do reino, determinando o curso da Reconquista e a consolidação de Portugal.
groups.mood: Drama iminente, tensão palpável e grandiosidade que reflete a monumentalidade das escolhas e seus impactos profundos.

imagePrompts.prompt: Afonso Henriques on horseback, silhouetted against a dramatic sunset over a medieval battlefield, a tattered Portuguese banner flapping in the wind. Rain is beginning to fall, reflecting the gravity of the moment. Ancient stone castle walls in the background. High contrast, cinematic.

A close-up of a medieval parchment being signed, a quill pen poised over the wax seal. Hands are tense, illuminated by candlelight. Shadows play on the faces of stern-looking nobles in the background, their expressions a mix of hope and apprehension. Royal insignia on the parchment.

subgroups.title: O Grito de Ourique
subgroups.description: A lendária vitória de Afonso Henriques contra as forças mouras que consolidou sua autoridade e abriu caminho para a independência do condado.
subgroups.mood: Triunfo épico, bravura no campo de batalha, a força da fé e da espada.

imagePrompts.prompt: Afonso Henriques, armored and on horseback, raising his sword in victory amidst a chaotic medieval battlefield. Fallen banners, a broken standard, and retreating Moorish soldiers in the background. Sunrays breaking through battle smoke.
A triumphant procession of Portuguese soldiers entering a fortified city, crowds cheering, banners flying high. The leader is visibly resolute and proud.

subgroups.title: Aliança com o Papado
subgroups.description: O reconhecimento da nova nação por Roma, conferindo legitimidade divina e apoio crucial contra adversários internos e externos.
subgroups.mood: Solenidade religiosa, poder eclesiástico, a união de fé e política.

imagePrompts.prompt: A solemn ceremony inside a grand, candlelit medieval cathedral. A Portuguese envoy kneels before a richly robed Pope, receiving a papal bull. Stained glass windows illuminate the scene.
A close-up of an ornate papal bull, with intricate calligraphy and a heavy wax seal depicting the symbols of the Holy See. A pair of gloved hands holds it carefully.

subgroups.title: A Conquista de Santarém
subgroups.description: A tomada estratégica de Santarém aos mouros, um feito militar que garantiu uma importante linha defensiva e abriu rotas comerciais vitais.
subgroups.mood: Estratégia militar vitoriosa, cerco de fortaleza, avanço territorial.

imagePrompts.prompt: Portuguese soldiers scaling the walls of a fortified city at dawn, ladders silhouetted against the rising sun. Battering rams at the gate, archers on the ramparts. A sense of urgency and determination.
A map of medieval Iberia, with a glowing arrow pointing towards Santarém, indicating its strategic importance. Small miniature armies moving on the map.

subgroups.title: Tratado de Zamora
subgroups.description: A assinatura do tratado histórico que reconheceu formalmente a independência de Portugal pelo Reino de Leão, solidificando sua soberania.
subgroups.mood: Diplomacia tensa, negociações decisivas, o nascimento de uma nação em documento.

imagePrompts.prompt: Two medieval monarchs, Afonso Henriques and Alfonso VII of León, standing across a long, heavy wooden table, advisors surrounding them. A large scroll of parchment lies open between them, quills nearby. A sense of grudging respect and political necessity.
A detailed shot of a hand signing a treaty with a quill pen, with an elaborate royal seal pressed into wax on the document. The background is blurred, showing a somber, formal setting.

subgroups.title: A Traição de Teresa
subgroups.description: A mãe de Afonso Henriques, Teresa, buscou aliança com Leão para manter sua suserania, resultando em conflito familiar e político.
subgroups.mood: Conflito familiar e político, intriga de corte, lealdades divididas.

imagePrompts.prompt: Infanta Teresa, stern-faced and regal, in a dimly lit throne room, flanked by advisors. She holds a letter with a Leonese crest, her expression suggesting defiance and resolve. Heavy tapestries in the background.
Afonso Henriques, young and determined, confronting his mother, Teresa, in a tense, candlelit chamber. Guards stand silently, emphasizing the gravity of the familial dispute.

subgroups.title: Derrota em Valdevez
subgroups.description: Um confronto militar que, embora não decisivo, representou um revés tático para Afonso Henriques nas suas disputas com Leão, revelando a fragilidade das fronteiras.
subgroups.mood: Frustração militar, recuo estratégico, o peso da derrota.

imagePrompts.prompt: Portuguese cavalry retreating through a muddy, rain-swept valley, banners tattered. A sense of weariness and disappointment hangs over the scene. Distant Leonese banners are visible on a hill.
Afonso Henriques, looking grim and mud-splattered, observing his retreating troops from a small rise, his hand resting on his sword hilt. The sky is overcast and oppressive.

subgroups.title: A Peste nas Cidades
subgroups.description: Uma epidemia devastadora que assolou as populações das cidades e fortalezas portuguesas, enfraquecendo a capacidade de defesa e o moral.
subgroups.mood: Desespero e doença, calamidade pública, o flagelo da natureza.

imagePrompts.prompt: A medieval street scene in a Portuguese town, shrouded in a sickly green fog. People are collapsed in doorways, and masked figures carry away bodies. A pervasive sense of fear and death.
A close-up of a medieval physician, wearing a beak mask, tending to a sick villager in a dark, cramped room. Candles cast long shadows, highlighting the grim reality of the plague.

subgroups.title: Saque de Lamego
subgroups.description: Um ataque mourisco bem-sucedido a Lamego resultou em pilhagem e devastação, lembrando a constante ameaça externa e a vulnerabilidade das conquistas cristãs.
subgroups.mood: Invasão e destruição, perda e luto, a crueldade da guerra de fronteira.

imagePrompts.prompt: Flames engulfing the wooden structures of a medieval town, smoke rising into a dark sky. Moorish cavalry ride through the streets, carrying looted goods. Despair on the faces of the few remaining inhabitants.
A wide shot of a ruined castle keep, still smoldering, with the remains of a siege engine nearby. Portuguese defenders survey the destruction, their expressions grim and defeated.
